---
name: Add or Change Person
about: Request a people entry addition or change in _data/people.yml
title: "[People] "
labels: [content, people]
assignees: []
---

## Request Type

- [ ] Add person
- [ ] Update person
- [ ] Move person between sections
- [ ] Remove person

## Target Section

Choose one:
- `faculty`
- `visitors`
- `postdocs`
- `phd_students`
- `alumni_visitors`
- `alumni_postdocs`
- `alumni_phd_students`

## Person Details

- Name:
- Role:
- Affiliation:
- Website URL:
- Email:
- Research:
- Photo path or photo source:

## Notes

If this is a move, mention the old section and the new section.
